mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM (SELECT A.USER_ID, A.USER_NM, (CASE WHEN B.USER_ABSNCE_AT IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE B.USER_ABSNCE_AT END) AS USER_ABSNCE_AT, (CASE WHEN B.USER_ABSNCE_AT IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS REG_YN, B.LAST_UPDUSR_ID, TO_CHAR(B.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, TO_CHAR(B.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM FROM COMVNUSERMASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN COMTNUSERABSNCE B ON A.USER_ID = B.EMPLYR_ID ) X WHERE 1 = 1 AND X.USER_NM LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
AND X.USER_ABSNCE_AT = #{selAbsnceAt}

SELECT A.USER_ID, A.USER_NM, (CASE WHEN B.USER_ABSNCE_AT IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE B.USER_ABSNCE_AT END) AS USER_ABSNCE_AT, (CASE WHEN B.USER_ABSNCE_AT IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS REG_YN, B.LAST_UPDUSR_ID, TO_CHAR(B.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, TO_CHAR(B.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM FROM COMVNUSERMASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN COMTNUSERABSNCE B ON A.USER_ID = B.EMPLYR_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNUSERABSNCE ( EMPLYR_ID, USER_ABSNCE_AT, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM ) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userAbsnceAt}, #{lastUpdusrId}, SYSDATETIME, #{lastUpdusrId}, SYSDATETIME)
mapper.update: UPDATE COMTNUSERABSNCE SET USER_ABSNCE_AT = #{userAbsnceAt}, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = SYSDATETIME WHERE EMPLYR_ID = #{userId}
